creator: smurfen@ludd.luth.se
text:
FreeBSD probes my Cyrix DX2-80 as an old Cyrix DLC, which is (as far as I know) mounted on a 386 socket. 

CPU: Cy486DLC (486-class CPU)
  Origin = "Cyrix"

My Cyrix is mounted on an ordinary 486 ZIFF socket.

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: 
Boot FreeBSD with a Cyrix DX2-80 processor
